title: Festive Thai Plum Chewy Umami Pilaf
description: This festive Thai plum chewy umami pilaf is a dairy-free treat that combines sweet plum jam with savory flavors for a satisfying side dish.

ingredients.name: 1 cup rice (preferably jasmine or basmati)
ingredients.notes: Rinse thoroughly to remove excess starch.

ingredients.name: 3 cups water or vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: Bring to a boil and reduce heat for simmering.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup plum jam (preferably sweetened with agave nectar)
ingredients.notes: Choose plums that are slightly ripe but not overly soft.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with tamari or another plant-based alternative if desired.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup unsweetened almond milk (or any other non-dairy milk of choice)
ingredients.notes: Add to taste for extra creaminess and moisture.

instructions: Prepare rice according to package instructions. Rinse it in cold water until the water runs clear.
While cooking the rice, heat plum jam and soy sauce in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir occasionally until slightly thickened and fragrant.
Once the rice is cooked, remove from heat and let sit for 10 minutes to cool down.
Gently fold the plum jam mixture into the cooked rice along with almond milk. Season lightly with salt.
Let everything mix together well and serve hot or at room temperature as a side dish.
